title: Gzsbaby Large Soft Brachiosaurus Dinosaur Toys, 82cm Jumbo Realistic Looking Dinosaur Toys for Kids 3-5, Toddler (Brown)
features: Big Dinosaur Toys： Dinosaur figures-brachiosaurus toys that kids love. The approximate size of the dinosaur is 32 inches. The texture is clear, without fading, and has a very real bumpy feeling（The shape and feel are almost identical to that of a non-inflatable dinosaur）, You can let your child enjoy the real fun that the world of dinosaurs has to offer.

Safe, Thickened and Drop-proof： These dinosaur toys are made from durable and specially thickened rubber so there is no need to worry about scratching your child's skin. They do not break easily and will withstand repeated rough play by your child. Our products are BPA, PVC, or phthalate-free and meet US standards to ensure your child's safety.

Realistic-Looking Educational Toy： Dinosaurs feature nice detailing making them perfect for educational displays or in everyday play. The giant dinosaur will stimulate children's imagination and creativity and increase their knowledge of dinosaurs. The great attention to detail and the realistic moves make this dinosaur play set the first choice of gift for dinosaur lovers.

Inflatable Dinosaur Play Set： Fill the dinosaur with air and become a strong dinosaur to stand up. （Similar to basketball inflation and deflation） Inflatable holes are well-sealed and not easy to leak. After playing, insert the pump needle to deflate the dinosaur, reduce the volume, convenient storage.

Your Ideal Gift Choice: Both boys and girls love toy dinosaurs. These dinosaurs are very suitable as gifts for children for Christmas/birthday/party. We always provide you with satisfactory after-sales service. Feel free to message us through “contact sellers” if products don't meet your expectations.
description: Product Description Giant Brachiosaurus is ready to make prehistory. The dinosaur is 32" long and features realistic dinosaur models that are vivid, safe, non-toxic, and exquisitely crafted. It encourages your kids to learn about the natural history and ages of dragons with this realistic dinosaur and they will be eager to learn more about paleontology, the fun never goes extinct. Realistic Jumbo Dinosaur Park Safe & Soft & Drop-resistant Dinosaurs toys are made of durable and soft rubber, there are no sharp edges or corners, without worrying about scratching your child’s skin. It is not easy to break and can withstand repeated rough play by children. Which will make it more durable and safe. Allowing your kids to play safely for a long time. Realistic-Looking and Oversize Dinosaurs feature nice detailing making them perfect for educational displays or in everyday play.
